candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2022 must prevent the display of slide shows on the lock screen.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the registry value below. 

If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE 
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Personalization\

Value Name: NoLockScreenSlideshow

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Control Panel >> Personalization >> Prevent enabling lock screen slide show to "Enabled".
title: Windows Server 2022 must prevent the display of slide shows on the lock screen.
